gates.requirement: Publish the standalone public repository and protect its release path.
Create and verify the docs.patchlab.dev DNS record for the published Pages origin.

gates.requirement: Choose the documentation and downloadable-example license.

gates.requirement: Approve the official PatchLab download origin, checksum path, installer, and update policy.
Provide release signing/notarization identity and a verified release artifact.
Complete the real-DAW support matrix for every claimed host and format.
Choose the public documentation-error and product-support destination.
gates.evidence: GitHub documentation issue form, SUPPORT.md, and private security-advisory route
